description: VCF-only subset of manifest.verified.json. 2026-04-21 audit drops vcfpy-gtone-0.13 (C2 ✗) and vcfpy-nocall-0.8 (C4 ✗).

anchor.verification_rule: PR #1554 merged 2021-06-10, first in htsjdk 3.0.0 on 2022-06-06 (AC/AN/AF filtered genotypes)

trigger.description: AC/AN/AF allele counts include filtered genotypes marked FT; should exclude filtered variants.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 3.0.4 (2022-11-23) hotfix reverted PR #1593 which had caused #1637's VCF sort-order regression

trigger.description: VCF sort order changed to use alleles for stability; breaks merging of existing valid VCFs causing false 'unsorted' errors.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 2.20.0 release notes cite 'Tolerate mixed case NaNs and Infinities in VCF (#1364)'

trigger.description: Pre-fix VCF codec rejects QUAL / INFO float values spelled with non-lowercase 'nan' or 'inf' (e.g. 'NaN', 'Inf', 'Infinity'), which htslib accepts per the VCF spec's float production rule. Causes differential disagreement on any VCF where upstream tools emit mixed-case float literals.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 2.20.0 release notes cite 'Output missing vcf fields as a single . (#1389)'

trigger.description: Pre-fix VCF writer serialises multi-value missing fields as '.,.,.' (one dot per value) instead of the spec-canonical single '.' for fully-missing values. Round-trip through pre-fix htsjdk changes INFO/FORMAT string representation.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 2.20.0 release notes cite 'VCF codec should handle multiple missing GL fields (#1372)'

trigger.description: Pre-fix VCF codec fails to handle FORMAT=GL when multiple per-genotype GL values are each individually missing ('.'). Throws instead of producing null, even though htslib accepts the input.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 2.20.0 release notes cite 'Handle PEDIGREE header lines differently for vcf4.2 vs vcf4.3 (#1401)'

trigger.description: Pre-fix VCF header parser produces inconsistent PEDIGREE entries between VCF 4.2 and 4.3 inputs; the same semantic pedigree record round-trips differently depending on declared fileformat version.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 2.20.1 release notes cite 'fix bug in VariantContextBuilder (#1403)' — explicitly a hotfix for the 2.20.0 regression

trigger.description: Regression in VariantContextBuilder introduced in htsjdk 2.20.0 — the builder emits incorrect field values under certain chains; hotfix in 2.20.1 reverts the regression.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 2.21.0 release notes cite 'Make VCFHeader not throw exception if contig header lines lack length field (#1418)'

trigger.description: Pre-fix VCF header parser throws on any '##contig=<ID=X>' header line that omits the length= attribute, even though the spec treats length as optional. htslib accepts such files; pre-fix htsjdk rejects them.

anchor.verification_rule: htsjdk 3.0.0 release notes cite 'Added GVCF mode for VariantContext type determination (#1544)'

trigger.description: Pre-fix VariantContext.getType() mis-classifies gVCF-style <NON_REF> records, producing wrong variant-type labels for gVCF blocks. Downstream tools that filter by variant type therefore miss entire classes of records.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.14.0 Bug Fixes: "A sample column value of 0|0 is not being parsed correctly (#176) (#187)"

trigger.description: Sample GT value '0|0' with GT undeclared in header causes a list artefact to leak into _genotype_updated, raising ValueError: invalid literal for int() with base 10: "['0".

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.14.0 Bug Fixes: "escaped equal sign in INFO fields (#171) (#172)"

trigger.description: Escaped '=' in INFO (e.g., p.Lys%3D) is lost on re-write; comma is escaped but '=' is not, breaking round-trip.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.13.4: "Fix INFO flag raises TypeError (#146)"

trigger.description: INFO flag present but header declares it as String type; raises TypeError: argument of type 'bool' is not iterable.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.13.5: "Treat .bgz files the same as .gz (#145, #149)"

trigger.description: '.bgz'-suffixed bgzipped VCF not recognized by reader; open fails.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.11.1: "Working around problem in HTSJDK output with incomplete FORMAT fields (#127)"

trigger.description: Incomplete trailing FORMAT fields (e.g. GATK 3.8 truncated output) raises KeyError: 'GQ'.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.64: "vcf/record/info/field/value: Percent-decode character and string values ([#300])"

trigger.description: Writing an INFO String containing ';' produced unreadable VCF; round-trip broke. Fix: percent-decoding of string/char values.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.82: "vcf/io/writer/record/info/field/value: Remove colon (:) from encode set ([#339])"

trigger.description: Writer over-encoded ':' in INFO values and ';'/'=' in sample values, producing non-round-trippable output.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.58: "vcf/io/writer/record/reference_bases: Resolve IUPAC ambiguity codes ([#268])"

trigger.description: IUPAC ambiguity codes in REF caused writer to emit corrupted / truncated lines (e.g. two records merged).

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.49: "vcf/lazy/record/bounds: Fix range for info field ([#223])"

trigger.description: lazy::Record::info_range returned the FILTER byte range instead of INFO; callers reading INFO saw FILTER bytes.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.49: "vcf/reader/lazy_record: Disallow newlines to appear in fields ([#224])"

trigger.description: Lazy reader read past end-of-record into next line when optional trailing fields were missing, corrupting the buffer.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.56: "vcf/io/writer/header/record: Write newlines for records in other collections ([#259])"

trigger.description: Writer emitted multiple '##'-prefixed header records without separator newlines, producing a malformed header.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.59: "Parse other header record values that start with a map prefix (<) as a string if there is no map identifier ([#241])"

trigger.description: VCF 4.2 header with raw value starting with '<' but no ID= (e.g., ##ID=<Description="...">) raised MissingId parse error.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.64 Fixed: "Fix counting number of values" / "Fix iterating over empty lists"

trigger.description: array::values iterator mis-counted entries and didn't terminate on empty lists; wrong length / infinite loop for INFO/FORMAT arrays.

anchor.verification_rule: Changelog 0.24: "vcf/record/genotypes/genotype: Fail parsing when there are more values than keys."

trigger.description: Genotype parser silently dropped sample values after the last FORMAT key; header without trailing newline triggered an infinite loop.
